# badge

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: The canonical chip primitive and shared chip shell (region-line single-line core, rigid leading icon, truncating label leaf): semantic variant × colorClass coloring, a rect|pill shape axis, size, and an optional monospace label. LinkChip and ToggleChip compose it.
- Web:
  - Uses: `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`
  - Exports: Types: `BadgeProps`, `BadgeShape`, `BadgeSize`, `BadgeVariant`; Values: `Badge`, `formatStatusLabel`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `apps/sonata/sources/midi/folders`, `apps/studio/compositions`, `apps/studio/contributions`, `apps/surface/floating`, `auth`, `build`, `build/build-info`, `config_v2/settings`,
